title: Distributed Systems Engineer - Data Platform - Analytics and Alerts
score_reasoning: Your 7 years of backend experience with Python and Go align well with this role's core requirements—Go is explicitly preferred for distributed systems and observability work, and your production expertise with Prometheus/Grafana matches the job's observability focus directly. The Analytics and Alerts team's work on GraphQL APIs and real-time systems maps closely to your microservices and system optimization background. However, this role sits slightly below strict 'senior' territory (posting emphasizes 3+ years and scalable APIs rather than leadership/architecture scope), and your experience with distributed systems, zero-downtime migrations, and multi-team impact suggests you may be overqualified for mid-level positioning. London and Lisbon are both Europe-based, meeting your timezone and geographic preferences well, though neither is Berlin—this creates a minor remote/location ambiguity. The role's strong company signal (Cloudflare: notable brand, strong product company, strong CV value) and alignment with your core tech stack and high-scale systems goals support growth potential, but the seniority positioning and lack of explicit senior-level architecture scope moderately cap that upside.

red_flags: No explicit 'Senior' or 'Staff' title—role emphasizes 3+ years and scalable APIs, potentially mid-level despite strong scope
GraphQL API experience mentioned as 'strong plus' rather than core requirement—your portfolio shows API work but not explicit GraphQL production experience
Kafka experience listed as 'plus'—you have Kafka consumer experience only, no producer or architecture design
Kubernetes listed as 'plus'—confirmed gap in your profile; no Kubernetes experience beyond basic Docker
ClickHouse and analytical database platform work—no evidence of ClickHouse or OLAP database optimization in your background
Location ambiguity: hybrid role anchored to London or Lisbon, not Berlin; unclear if fully remote is available
